Answer format: for true/false questions reply with exactly one word, true or false. For list questions reply with a JSON array of entity IDs, e.g. ["customer_03","customer_07"], or [] if none.

Question: On day 360, across frames [actual, jurisdiction_20, customer_06, partner_12], list every customer value X such that registered_in(product=product_15, partner=partner_00, customer=?X) holds, labeling each value with the frame it holds in. Answer as (value, frame) pairs (possibly empty).
Structured form: {"at_day":360,"find_slot":"customer","pattern":{"relation":"rel_b00_registered_in","args":{"customer":{"var":"X"},"partner":{"const":"partner_00"},"product":{"const":"product_15"}}}}
